commits.subject: Day 137 (02:31): Expand graph evidence relation filter to include runtime event relations (Task 2)

eval.reason: The `graph_evidence_relation` filter now includes all required runtime relation types (observed_in, derived_from, traced_by, references_file, modified_file, modified, records_model_call, uses_model) alongside existing evaluation types. Tests are updated to assert these new relations appear in evidence output. Build and tests pass.
